thread.title: Conversation
thread.emptyState: No replies yet. Start the conversation below.
thread.internalNoteCheckbox: Internal note (not visible to the customer)

acknowledge.label: Acknowledge — looking into it
acknowledge.body: Thanks for reaching out — we're looking into this now and will update you shortly.

moreInfo.label: Request more info
moreInfo.body: Could you share a few more details (screenshots, booking ID, or profile ID) so we can investigate faster?

resolved.label: Resolved — please confirm
resolved.body: This has been resolved on our end — please refresh and let us know if the issue persists.

escalated.label: Escalated to specialist team
escalated.body: We've escalated this to our specialist team and expect an update within 24 hours.

closing.label: Closing — thanks for your patience
closing.body: Thanks for your patience — we're closing this ticket for now. Feel free to reopen if the issue returns.

empty.title: No open reports
empty.description: Flagged conversations will appear here for review and action.
